contentBlocks.original:
रामदेवं रघुकुलपतिं रामचंद्रं भजेऽहं ।
कृष्णं देवं यदुकुलमणिं वासुदेवं नमामि ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
rāmadevaṃ raghukulapatiṃ rāmacaṃdraṃ bhaje'haṃ .
kṛṣṇaṃ devaṃ yadukulamaṇiṃ vāsudevaṃ namāmi ..
contentBlocks.translation: I sing in praise of Lord Rama, the Lord of Raghu dynasty, Ramachandra, I salute Lord Krishna, the precious gem of the Yadu dynasty, Vaasudeva.
contentBlocks.meanings: रामदेवं (rāmadevaṃ) – Lord Rama (rāma:Rama | devaṃ:Lord); रघुकुलपतिं (raghukulapatiṃ) – Lord of Raghu dynasty (raghu:Raghu | kula:dynasty | patiṃ:Lord); रामचंद्रं (rāmacaṃdraṃ) – Ramachandra (rāma:Rama | caṃdraṃ:moon); भजेऽहं (bhaje'haṃ) – I sing in praise; कृष्णं (kṛṣṇaṃ) – Krishna; देवं (devaṃ) – Lord; यदुकुलमणिं (yadukulamaṇiṃ) – gem of Yadu dynasty (yadu:Yadu | kula:dynasty | maṇiṃ:gem); वासुदेवं (vāsudevaṃ) – Vaasudeva; नमामि (namāmi) – I salute;
